message: I've been reading through the Red Cross's hurricane prep guide, and I'm genuinely impressed by how straightforward it is—no overwhelming jargon, just solid steps you can actually take before storm season ramps up. The nice part is realizing that a lot of hurricane readiness overlaps with regular emergency prep, so you're building skills that help with other situations too. What's one thing on your prep list that you've already tackled, or are you just getting started with this stuff?
